page_content:
Formerly: AASP441.

AAAS443 Law and the Black Community (3 Credits)

The relationship between Black Americans and the law, particularly criminal law, criminal institutions and the criminal justice system. Examines historical changes in the legal status of blacks and changes in the causes of racial disparities in criminal involvement and punishments. Prerequisite: HIST255, AAAS202, or AAAS100; or permission of BSOS- African American and Africana Studies department.

Credit Only Granted for. AASP443 or AAAS443.
